notes: Mission guidance marks the SemVer assertion in tests/integration-live-data.test.ts as known pre-existing noise.
Mission guidance also marks broad-suite ENOSPC failures during script-backed tests as unrelated baseline noise in this environment.
The suite's milestone-owned runtime follow-up coverage was reviewed separately and no owned failures were identified.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the characterization-first step so workers may manually reproduce live listener/runtime drift before adding the failing regression when listen()-time behavior diverges from inject/buildApp behavior.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review misc-live-server-seeded-bootstrap-followup found the worker had to reproduce the live src/server.ts mismatch first and only then add the listener regression in tests/app.test.ts; the current skill text implies test-first is always practical.
